name: grok-orchestrator
description: Use Grok 4.5 as a structured, read-only advisor for plan gates, research, panels, and workspace reviews in Codex.

interface.longDescription: Keep Codex as the root orchestrator while Grok 4.5 acts as a high-effort advisor for structured plan gates, sourced research, independent panels, and read-only workspace reviews.
defaultPrompt: Ask Grok 4.5 to gate this plan and return PLAN_APPROVED or PLAN_REVISE.
Use Grok 4.5 to research this decision with structured claims and sources.
Run a two-member Grok panel, then compare the independent reviews.
